object_a.label: couch
object_a.description: Long dark brown leather sectional sofa along left wall
object_a.long_form_open_description: A multi-seat dark brown leather reclining sectional that runs along the left foreground wall. Cushions are segmented with visible seams, leather has slight sheen. Sofa sits directly on the carpet, occupies most of the left third of the image.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: Directly left of the central carpet area; adjacent to a small side table with lamp and a plant.
object_a.object_text_short: Long dark brown leather sectional sofa along left wall
object_a.object_text_long: left sector | A multi-seat dark brown leather reclining sectional that runs along the left foreground wall. Cushions are segmented with visible seams, leather has slight sheen. Sofa sits directly on the carpet, occupies most of the left third of the image.

object_b.label: couch
object_b.description: long dark brown leather sofa along right wall
object_b.long_form_open_description: Three-seat dark brown leather reclining sofa with segmented cushions and visible seams; appears matched in material and style to the center loveseat. Positioned parallel to the staircase and right wall.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: Placed along the right side of the room facing toward the center; to the left of the staircase base and next to a side table with a lamp.
